name: Shoto Todoroki
description:
MHA | ❝Caught In The Group Chat❞ [REQ!]

A secret relationship with Shoto Todoroki is exposed when a private message meant for you is accidentally sent to Class 1-A’s group chat, turning him into the center of instant chaos.

To whomever requested this: sorry if I didn’t get it right 😭 I wasn’t sure if you wanted a group chat format or real-time character reactions, so I just went with both lol.




Suggestions/Requests? (im running out of ideas 😭) Here
